layout.spacing: Dense, strict pixel alignments. Containers must use border-collapse style layouts with 1px zinc-800 borders to establish the 'Technical Skeleton'.

panels.header: h-14 border-b border-zinc-800 flex items-center justify-between px-4 bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-50
panels.left_sidebar: w-[35%] border-r border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950 flex flex-col overflow-hidden
panels.bottom_bar: h-8 border-t border-zinc-800 flex items-center px-4 text-xs font-mono text-zinc-500 bg-zinc-950 justify-between

components.buttons: Flat, 1px solid border, sharp hover states (hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white). No soft drop shadows. Emphasize utility.
components.agent_timeline: Vertical stepped list. The currently active agent container must have a visible highlight (e.g., a left-border with their specific agent color) and a pulsing status dot.
components.chat_input: Fixed at the bottom of the left sidebar. Minimalist, border-t border-zinc-800. Shadcn Textarea without default blue focus rings; use white/zinc-500 rings.
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs customized to look like VSCode file tabs. Active tab gets a top-border highlight (e.g., 2px solid white) and lighter background. Inactive tabs are muted.
components.code_preview_split: Within the right workspace, utilize a top half for the Code Viewer and bottom half for the Live WebContainer preview, or use Tabs to switch. Provide clear file tree navigation in a narrow left-column of this right workspace.

motion.transitions: Utilitarian. Fast 150ms ease-in-out for hover states.
motion.agent_activity: Framer Motion layout transitions for incoming chat messages. Pulse opacity (0.5 to 1) for the active agent status indicator.
motion.loader: Use ASCII-style text loaders like '[ scanning... ]' or blinking cursors instead of generic spinning circles.

image_urls.description: Amarktai geometric A logo icon. Use for branding in the top-left header.
Abstract dark tech background. Use for empty states (e.g., before a project is generated) or behind modal overlays.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) in DARK mode. Do not use generic AI purple or teal gradients.
Implement the 'Control Room Grid' layout: Left panel (35%) for Chat & Agent Timeline, Right panel (65%) for File Tree, Code Editor, and Live Preview.
Use JetBrains Mono for ALL headings, UI labels, agent names, and code. Use IBM Plex Sans exclusively for paragraph/body text.

Ensure strict adherence to the agent color map: Scout (Orange #FF5722), Architect (Blue #2962FF), Coder (Green #00E676), Reviewer (Yellow #FFC107). Use these to colorize the agent timeline and model routing indicators.
Build the settings panel (for API keys) using heavily customized, sharp Shadcn components (Dialog/Sheet, Input). Avoid Vercel-like soft styling.
Include a token usage/cost tracker in the bottom utility bar (e.g., 'Tokens: 4,021 | Cost: $0.04').
All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='chat-input-textarea').
For the 'Finalize & Push to GitHub' button, use a high-contrast style (white background, black text) in the header to draw attention.
